mission.title: netdata: Kubernetes Monitoring Improvement Ideas
mission.description: Kubernetes Monitoring Improvement Ideas. Requested by 6+ users.

steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata version
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
First of all thanks for a great piece of software and the willingness to make it better.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Kubernetes Monitoring Improvement Ideas
steps.description:
This was actually the first OpenSource project I contributed to ❤️.  Since all I did was copy an existing notification plugin and tweak it, it's really easy for me to sign this. It was interesting reading the license debate and seeing how much people care about the future of Netdata. 

I'm also
```yaml
drwxr-xr-x. 2 root root 0 Mar  2 15:31 besteffort
drwxr-xr-x. 5 root root 0 Mar  8 10:38 burstable
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cgroup.clone_children
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cgroup.procs
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpuacct.stat
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpuacct.usage
-r--r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpuacct.usage_percpu
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpu.cfs_period_us
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpu.cfs_quota_us
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpu.rt_period_us
-rw-r--r--. 1 root root 0 Mar  2 15:17 cpu.rt_runtime_
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Kubernetes Monitoring Improvement Ideas" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This was actually the first OpenSource project I contributed to ❤️.  Since all I did was copy an existing notification plugin and tweak it, it's really easy for me to sign this. It was interesting reading the license debate and seeing how much people care about the future of Netdata. 

I'm also excited about the move to CNCF as I work daily on Kubernetes and I'm CKAD.
